title: Find My Device - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device feature shows Location and Geo icons after granting "Allow while using app" permission, but consent is not re-prompted after app restart
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the Find My Device feature.
4. When prompted for location permission, tap "Allow while using app".
5. Observe that the Location and Geo icons become visible on the screen.
6. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely.
7. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate back to the Find My Device feature.
expected: After restarting the app, the user should be prompted again for location consent when accessing the Find My Device feature, since the permission was only granted "while using the app".
